scripts.test:static: npm run build && npx serve out
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('node_modules', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.rmSync('.next', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.rmSync('package-lock.json', {force:true}); console.log('🗑️ Cleaned modules and cache!');"
